questions.text: Which of the following describes a key bottleneck related to Networking Architectures?
options: Inefficient scaling of OSI 7-layer model vs TCP/IP protocol suite boundary mappings.
questions.correct_answer: Inefficient scaling of OSI 7-layer model vs TCP/IP protocol suite boundary mappings.
questions.explanation: The topic covers how OSI 7-layer model vs TCP/IP protocol suite boundary mappings scales under concurrent workloads, which represents the primary bottlenecks.
